steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes how the Nobel Prize is given when the Committee rewards two or three people at once. The contrast is between a prize given to "a single person" and one given to multiple recipients — so the blank must capture the idea of shared, simultaneous receipt.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'retroactively': means after the fact. Says nothing about multiple recipients. ✗
  • Choice B — 'ceremoniously': describes manner or formality. Irrelevant to how many people share the award. ✗
  • Choice C — 'jointly': means together or shared among parties. Directly captures multiple people receiving the prize at the same time, matching "among those awarded." ✓
  • Choice D — 'reluctantly': describes attitude. Has nothing to do with shared distribution. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
